requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC Requirements for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩的OCPP互操作与EMC要求
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁的OCPP互操作與EMC要求

summary.en: Cameroon does not have a nationally mandated charge-point management platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed as of 2026. However, any networked or smart EV charging deployment in Cameroon that requires back-office management, access control, billing, or load management will conventionally use OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) as the communication standard, consistent with Cameroon's IEC-aligned regulatory posture and international charging infrastructure practice. OCPP 1.6 and OCPP 2.0.1 are the prevailing versions in new IEC-ecosystem deployments. EMC compliance to the IEC 61000 series is required for electrical equipment placed on the Cameroon market under ANOR's IEC-adoption programme and PECAE pre-shipment conformity. IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions), IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations and flicker), and IEC 61000-4 series immunity tests are the applicable EMC baseline. A CISPR 32 or IEC 55032 emission test may be required for chargers with wireless or smart-metering functions.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，喀麦隆尚无与卡塔尔Tarsheed等效的全国性强制充电点管理平台。但是，在喀麦隆需要后台管理、访问控制、计费或负载管理的任何联网或智慧电动汽车充电部署，通常将采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）作为通信标准，与喀麦隆的IEC对齐监管立场和国际充电基础设施惯例相一致。OCPP 1.6和OCPP 2.0.1是IEC生态系统新部署的主流版本。根据ANOR的IEC采标计划和PECAE出口前合格评定，在喀麦隆市场销售的电气设备须符合IEC 61000系列EMC要求。IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流发射）、IEC 61000-3-3（电压波动和闪变）及IEC 61000-4系列抗扰度测试为适用的EMC基线。具有无线或智能计量功能的充电桩可能需要CISPR 32或IEC 55032发射测试。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，喀麥隆尚無與卡塔爾Tarsheed等效的全國性強制充電點管理平台。但是，在喀麥隆需要後台管理、訪問控制、計費或負載管理的任何聯網或智慧電動汽車充電部署，通常將採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）作為通訊標準，與喀麥隆的IEC對齊監管立場和國際充電基礎設施慣例相一致。OCPP 1.6和OCPP 2.0.1是IEC生態系統新部署的主流版本。根據ANOR的IEC採標計劃和PECAE出口前合格評定，在喀麥隆市場銷售的電氣設備須符合IEC 61000系列EMC要求。IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流發射）、IEC 61000-3-3（電壓波動和閃變）及IEC 61000-4系列抗擾度測試為適用的EMC基線。具有無線或智能計量功能的充電樁可能需要CISPR 32或IEC 55032發射測試。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) 1.6 / 2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques (immunity)
CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (for chargers with wireless/smart functions)
ANOR PECAE — pre-shipment EMC conformity for electrical equipment imported into Cameroon

summary.en: China DC fast chargers use GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, a CAN bus protocol that is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may use proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling used in IEC 62196 Type 2 systems. China EMC standards (GB 17625 series for harmonic limits, GB/T 17626 series for immunity) align structurally with IEC 61000 but may differ in specific limits, test conditions, or frequency ranges; a clause-level review is needed before asserting equivalence for Cameroon market access.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系统所用的PP/CP信号。中国EMC标准（谐波限值GB 17625系列、抗扰度GB/T 17626系列）在结构上与IEC 61000对应，但在具体限值、测试条件或频率范围上可能存在差异；在声称等效性以进入喀麦隆市场前须完成逐条审查。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系統所用的PP/CP信號。中國EMC標準（諧波限值GB 17625系列、抗擾度GB/T 17626系列）在結構上與IEC 61000對應，但在具體限值、測試條件或頻率範圍上可能存在差異；在聲稱等效性以進入喀麥隆市場前須完成逐條審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB 17625 series — China harmonic emission limits (structurally aligned with IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3)
GB/T 17626 series — China immunity standards (structurally aligned with IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) for networked chargers, the firmware supports the OCPP version required by the Cameroon charge-point operator or project owner (typically OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1); (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC deployments; (3) IEC 61000 series EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are available for ANOR/PECAE conformity; (4) any wireless or smart-metering function carries CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 emission evidence; (5) immunity test evidence (IEC 61000-4 series) demonstrates stability against voltage surges and power-quality events prevalent on Cameroon's grid. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP back-office implementation cannot support IEC-ecosystem charge-point management in Cameroon.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 对于联网充电桩，固件支持喀麦隆充电点运营商或项目业主所要求的OCPP版本（通常为OCPP 1.6或2.0.1）；(2) CCS2直流部署中，GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 具备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告以满足ANOR/PECAE合格评定要求；(4) 任何无线或智能计量功能须附有CISPR 32 / IEC 55032发射证据；(5) 抗扰度测试证据（IEC 61000-4系列）证明在喀麦隆电网常见的电压浪涌和电能质量事件下的稳定性。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP后台实现的充电桩，无法在喀麦隆支持IEC生态系统的充电点管理。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 對於聯網充電樁，固件支持喀麥隆充電點運營商或項目業主所要求的OCPP版本（通常為OCPP 1.6或2.0.1）；(2) CCS2直流部署中，GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 具備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告以滿足ANOR/PECAE合格評定要求；(4) 任何無線或智能計量功能須附有CISPR 32 / IEC 55032發射證據；(5) 抗擾度測試證據（IEC 61000-4系列）證明在喀麥隆電網常見的電壓浪涌和電能質量事件下的穩定性。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP後台實現的充電樁，無法在喀麥隆支持IEC生態系統的充電點管理。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: Required by deployment context for networked chargers in IEC-ecosystem projects; no nationally mandated Cameroon charge-point platform confirmed as of 2026-06-14. EMC: Mandatory under ANOR IEC adoption and PECAE pre-shipment conformity for imported electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication and is not OCPP-compatible; China EMC standards are structurally similar to IEC 61000 but require clause-level equivalence review for Cameroon market access

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office capability is a practical deployment requirement for any networked charger in an IEC-ecosystem market such as Cameroon, even without a single mandated national platform. IEC 61000 EMC evidence is required for ANOR/PECAE import conformity. GB/T 27930 DC communication and China-only EMC test reports are not sufficient substitutes without IEC-equivalent accredited testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于喀麦隆等IEC生态系统市场中的任何联网充电桩，OCPP后台能力是实际部署的必要条件，即使没有单一强制性国家平台亦然。IEC 61000 EMC证据是ANOR/PECAE进口合格评定的要求。在未进行IEC等效认可测试的情况下，GB/T 27930直流通信和仅适用于中国的EMC测试报告不能作为充分替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於喀麥隆等IEC生態系統市場中的任何聯網充電樁，OCPP後台能力是實際部署的必要條件，即使沒有單一強制性國家平台亦然。IEC 61000 EMC證據是ANOR/PECAE進口合格評定的要求。在未進行IEC等效認可測試的情況下，GB/T 27930直流通訊和僅適用於中國的EMC測試報告不能作為充分替代。
